title: Tab Gamemodes
body:
# TabGamemode
Have you ever had the suspicion that your friends are going into creative in your SMP? Want to bust a corrupt server admin? Well, do I got the mod for you!

Introducing: TAB Gamemodes!

This mod allows you to see all player's gamemodes in the tablist!

Here is an example of someone in survival:

![Me in minehut lobby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dac78651c0465d2f800ce57b8a18a49a53ba39b.png)

The gamemodes are: [A] for adventure, [C] For creative, [S] for survival, and [Sp] for spectator!

## IMPORTANT:
This **WILL** delete all rank prefixes / color applied to the player. This means you will not be able to see any ranks with this mod enabled. This mod can be toggled by clicking the middle mouse button. You can rebind this in minecraft's controls menu.

#### *Made by oddbyte*
